import io
import string
import list

fn parse_nums(_ line: String) -> List<Int>
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      match string.parse_int(t)
      when Some(n)
        result = list.push(result, n)
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn insert_desc(_ sorted: List<Int>, _ x: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut out: List<Int> = []
  mut inserted = false
  mut i = 0
  while i < sorted.len()
    match sorted.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      if not inserted and x > v
        out = list.push(out, x)
        inserted = true
      end
      out = list.push(out, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not inserted
    out = list.push(out, x)
  end
  out
end

fn sort_desc(_ nums: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  mut j = 0
  while j < nums.len()
    match nums.get(j)
    when Some(x)
      sorted = insert_desc(sorted, x)
    when None
      ()
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  sorted
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let nums = parse_nums(line1)
let k = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
when Some(n)
  n
when None
  0
end

let sorted = sort_desc(nums)

let take = if k > sorted.len()
  sorted.len()
else
  k
end

mut out = ""
mut p = 0
while p < take
  match sorted.get(p)
  when Some(v)
    if p == 0
      out = "#{v}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  p = p + 1
end

println(out)
